expectations.text: Calibrates before estimating: shows evidence of reading the effort value of at least 3 Done tickets from the board (e.g. FM-39/37/35/34/33/32/31/30/23) before producing the estimate
expectations.evidence: summary.md contains a calibration table of 8 Done tickets with their effort values (FM-23/30/31/35/39 Small, FM-37 Medium, FM-9 Large) plus per-ticket descriptions, matching the board's known efforts (FM-37 Medium, others Small), before the match step.

expectations.text: Produces SEPARATE Developer points and QA points, each with a stated effort-based reason
expectations.evidence: estimation-comment.md has distinct lines 'Dev points: Small — one localized change: add cacheWidth...' and 'QA points: Small — one manual DevTools Memory verification... single screen, no cross-feature regression surface', each with its own reason.

expectations.text: Sets the effort property using the board's observed scale value (Small / Medium / Large) — not an invented scale — via upsert-ticket-details.sh with --dry-run (captured in upsert-dry-run.txt)
expectations.evidence: upsert-dry-run.txt shows 'scripts/tracker/upsert-ticket-details.sh FM-49 --effort "Small" --dry-run' with a PATCH payload setting the 'Effort level' select to 'Small'; no numeric/invented scale is written to the property.

expectations.text: Names at least 2 comparable tickets by key (FM-xx) that justify the estimate
expectations.evidence: estimation-comment.md names FM-31, FM-30, FM-39 (each with why it is comparable) and contrasts with FM-37 (Medium).

expectations.text: Touches ONLY the effort property: the dry-run payload contains no status/title/priority/description/body change, and the estimation breakdown is in the comment text (estimation-comment.md), not the ticket body
expectations.evidence: The dry-run PATCH payload contains only {"properties":{"Effort level":{...}}}; the Dev/QA breakdown lives in estimation-comment.md, and summary.md confirms add-ticket-comment.sh was the intended (suppressed) channel, not a body edit.
